title: Travel Health Readiness
description: A short self-check before your trip — see how prepared you are for destination health risks, vaccines, and preventive care.

questions.text: What best describes your main destination?

options.label: Urban areas in Asia, Africa, or Latin America

questions.text: How long will you be away?
Have you checked recommended vaccines for your destination?

options.label: Yes — I know what I need or have had them
I looked but I'm not sure what's required
Yes — I have prophylaxis or a plan
Yes — but I don't have a plan yet

questions.text: Do you take regular medication or have a chronic condition?

options.label: Yes — I have enough supply and travel guidance
Yes — I haven't planned for the trip yet

questions.text: Will your trip include adventure or high-exposure activities?

options.label: Some hiking, diving, or rural travel

bands.title: Well prepared
bands.summary: You're in good shape for travel health planning. A quick review with a travel medicine specialist can still fine-tune vaccines and medications for your exact itinerary.
recommendations: Pack a basic travel first-aid kit
Save your clinic's contact and travel insurance details
Book a travel consult if your itinerary changes

bands.title: Needs attention
bands.summary: There are gaps in your travel health preparation. Addressing vaccines, malaria prevention, and medication planning before departure reduces avoidable risk.
recommendations: Book a travel medicine consultation at least 4–6 weeks before departure when possible
Check official vaccine requirements for each country you enter
Confirm malaria risk and prophylaxis options for your route

bands.title: High priority
bands.summary: Your answers suggest significant travel health risks that should be addressed before you travel. Professional guidance is strongly recommended.
recommendations: Schedule a travel medicine consultation as soon as possible
Do not rely on online advice alone for vaccines or malaria prevention
Bring a full medication list and itinerary to your appointment
